new_classes.label_en: Other spirituous beverages (mixtures), in containers holding > 2 l (CN 2208 90 78)
new_classes.label_de: Andere alkoholhaltige Getränke (Mischungen), in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 l (KN 2208 90 78)
new_classes.definition_en: Other spirituous beverages that are mixtures (e.g. whisky-soda, spirit+juice, tea with alcohol), classified under CN 2208 90 78, presented in containers holding more than 2 litres. Corresponds to the 'other' (large container) counterpart of CN 2208 90 69 for mixture-type spirituous beverages.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for CN 2208 90 78 is minimal: it states "Other spirituous beverages" and cross-references the explanatory note to subheading 2208 90 69. In the running TBox, CN 2208 90 69 is modelled as OtherSpiritousLargeContainer22089069 with OtherSpiritousBeverageMixtureQuality (mixtures: whisky-soda, tea with alcohol, spirit+juice, HS 2208 items 14–18) in large containers (> 2 l). CN 2208 90 78 is the sibling code for the same mixture-type spirituous beverages in large containers in a different sub-branch of the hierarchy. The two distinguishing criteria captured are: (1) OtherSpiritousBeverageMixtureQuality and (2) LargeContainer (> 2 l). Coverage is partial (0.6) because: (a) the exact scope of "other" mixtures covered by the cross-referenced note to 2208 90 69 is not fully formalised — the TBox quality class label describes mixtures but does not enumerate them exhaustively; (b) the precise structural distinction between 2208 90 69 and 2208 90 78 within the hierarchy (different parent subheading branches) cannot be captured without additional sibling-branch context or a dedicated quality to distinguish them; and (c) no additional product-discriminating legal text content is provided beyond the cross-reference. The axioms proposed are the best achievable representation given current TBox resources.
